query:x_first_tick_spacing_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested value as an integer
query:x_first_tick_spacing_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one segment [[x0,y0],[x1,y1]] from the first visible tick mark to the second visible tick mark on the requested axis
